mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations r JOIN hotel_kiosk.members m ON r.member_no = m.member_no ORDER BY r.reservation_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations r JOIN hotel_kiosk.members m ON r.member_no = m.member_no ORDER BY r.reservation_id DESC
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations r JOIN hotel_kiosk.members m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE r.checkin_date = #{checkinDate}
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations r JOIN hotel_kiosk.members m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE r.status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations r JOIN hotel_kiosk.members m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations r JOIN hotel_kiosk.members m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE r.reservation_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reservationId}, '%')
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations r JOIN hotel_kiosk.members m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE m.member_name = #{memberName}
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations r JOIN hotel_kiosk.members m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE m.member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{memberName}, '%')
SELECT room_no FROM hotel_kiosk.room_master ORDER BY room_no

SELECT r.reservation_id, -- 조식 SUM(CASE WHEN om.option_category = 'Meal' AND om.option_name LIKE CONCAT('조식', '%') THEN orcd.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS breakfast, -- 석식 SUM(CASE WHEN om.option_category = 'Meal' AND om.option_name LIKE CONCAT('석식', '%') THEN orcd.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS dinner, -- 이용시설 SUM(CASE WHEN om.option_category = 'Leisure' THEN orcd.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS facility, -- 어메니티 SUM(CASE WHEN om.option_category = 'Consumable' THEN orcd.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS amenity FROM reservations r LEFT JOIN options_record orcd ON r.idx = orcd.idx LEFT JOIN option_master om ON orcd.option_id = om.option_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId} GROUP BY r.reservation_id;
